guardStatus.primaryBody: The inline script in <head> is present. The dataLayer guard installs synchronously before any tracker runs.
guardStatus.fallbackBody: The inline script is missing but the JS-plugin fallback reads its config from the meta tags. Your theme likely overrides 'layout/meta.html.twig' without calling {{ parent() }}. The guard installs with a delay on DOMContentLoaded.
guardStatus.missingBody: Neither the inline script nor the fallback meta tags were found in the storefront. Either 'Enable dataLayer price-leak guard' is off in the plugin config, or a theme/plugin overrides 'layout/meta.html.twig' and 'layout_head_meta_tags_charset' without calling parent().
guardStatus.errorBody: The storefront could not be fetched. Verify the sales channel is reachable.
